75779.subject: Circle Wins Its Bank Charter
75779.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These were the biggest news in web3 today:

* **[Circle](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/circle-wins-final-occ-approval-for-national-trust-bank)**[ wins final OCC approval to launch a national trust bank for USDC](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/circle-wins-final-occ-approval-for-national-trust-bank)

* **[HSBC](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/hsbc-issues-first-digitally-native-structured-product-in-hong-kong)**[ issues its first digitally native structured product in Hong Kong](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/hsbc-issues-first-digitally-native-structured-product-in-hong-kong)

* **[Kraken](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-to-rebuild-app-around-ai-agentic-trading)**[ is rebuilding its app around AI agentic trading for retail users](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-to-rebuild-app-around-ai-agentic-trading)

* **[Uniswap](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/uniswap-floats-turning-on-protocol-fees-for-v4-pools)**[ floats turning on protocol fees for its v4 pools](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/uniswap-floats-turning-on-protocol-fees-for-v4-pools)

* **[Coinbase](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/coinbase-chief-legal-officer-paul-grewal-to-step-down)**[ chief legal officer Paul Grewal is stepping down](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/coinbase-chief-legal-officer-paul-grewal-to-step-down)

For years the biggest question hanging over stablecoins was who, if anyone, was watching the reserves. Circle just put itself under the same federal supervisor that oversees national banks.

**Circle** [won final OCC approval to charter a national trust bank](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/circle-wins-final-occ-approval-for-national-trust-bank), **First National Digital Currency Bank**, letting it custody digital assets and eventually hold **USDC** reserves under direct federal banking supervision. The charter puts the infrastructure behind the second-largest stablecoin inside the national bank system. Shares of **CRCL** rose more than 10% on the news.

This is the endgame the GENIUS Act pointed toward: stablecoin reserves held and examined the way bank deposits are. A federally supervised trust bank gives institutions a cleaner story to tell compliance desks, and it hands Circle a moat that rivals without a charter will spend years trying to match.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

##### PARTNER

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6d4bba59-efad-4d7b-83b4-d6311560ddc3/png)
Caption: 

**Reach 30K+ crypto-native readers every weekday. **The Defiant lands in front of fund managers, founders, builders, and traders across the on-chain ecosystem. [Sponsor an issue →](https://sponsor.thedefiant.io)

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## Passive Income on Ethereum for All: How Rocket Pool Scales Liquid Staking

With institutions racing onchain, the base layer they'r

75778.subject: Feature flags, Railway Agent in Slack & Discord, usage limits in the CLI
75778.body:
It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week  

Railway

PRODUCT UPDATE

***************
Changelog time!
***************

It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week:

•Feature flags

•Chat with the Railway Agent from Slack and Discord

•Workspace and Agent usage limits in the CLI

•Fixes and improvements

Read the changelog ( https://railway.com/changelog/2026-07-10-feature-flags?utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

If you have any thoughts/feedback on the changes we’re making, reach out on Central Station! ( https://station.railway.com?utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

- Your friends at Railway

75776.subject: 🟪 Friday Charts
75776.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“Even if we’re not sure that we’ve crossed that bridge yet, we think it’s time to start thinking about it.”
_— __Anthropic on AI consciousness_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7cd6d32e-0ff7-4a20-a48d-d2ccd8c05f55/image.jpeg?t=1783715973)
Caption: 

# Friday charts: the J-Space

The reclusive billionaire building sentient robots in _Ex Machina_ dismisses the Turing Test as an outdated measure of progress in AI.

“We’re way past that,” Nathan Bateman [tells](https://clip.cafe/ex-machina-2014/uh-its-just-in-the-turing-test/?utm_source=chatgpt.com) his house guest. “If I hid Ava from you so you could just hear her voice, she would pass for human. The real test is to show you that she’s a robot and then see if you still feel she has consciousness.” 

A Google DeepMind researcher [has dubbed](https://youtu.be/BQQv36f2ag0?si=bs5gNCFAQHzxnAGt&t=579) this the Garland Test, in honor of the film’s writer_, _Alex Garland. 

The Turing Test is a trick: can you be fooled into thinking a hidden AI is human? 

The Garland Test is the real thing: do you feel the AI right in front of you is conscious?

This week, AI may have passed the Garland Test.

Researchers at Anthropic [report](https://www.anthropic.com/research/global-workspace) that Claude now has “a mental workspace” — a neural hub where concepts light up, interact, and are deliberately weighed before Claude generates text to answer your prompts. 

The space where it thinks before it speaks (and while it speaks, too).

They call this neural hub a “J-space,” named for the mathematical technique — the Jacobian lens — they used to discover it.

Others might simply call it a mind. 

Claude uses the space for mental math. It can think about one thing in its J-space while it tells you something else in a chat. 

It can think about thinking.

“If you ask Claude what it's thinking about,” the researchers say, “it will tell you what’s in the J-space.”

Instructed _not_ to think about something — an elephant, say — Claude couldn’t. The idea of an elephant involuntarily appears in its J-space.

“Experiments tell us that these AI models have internal thoughts,” the researchers conclude, “silent words they reason with but don’t

75764.subject: [Action Required] Identity Verification Advanced for EEA Users
75764.body:
Anti-phishing Code e2iWhGtX

Dear Bybit User,

As part of our ongoing commitment to regulatory compliance, Identity Verification Advanced – Proof of Address will be utilized for the categorization of users. You have been identified as a user with a completed, valid Proof of Address and confirmed your country of residence as part of the European Economic Area (EEA). If your country of residence has changed, please re-submit your Proof of Address.

Why is this required?
Bybit EU is our MiCAR-licensed entity authorized to serve EEA residents. Going forward, EEA residents (except for Malta) will be able to receive products and services through Bybit EU. Once our user migration plan is in place, access to services on Bybit Global will be progressively limited for users located in the EEA. Users will start receiving further communications about such changes in July. The right platform for you will be determined based on your country of residence, using your valid Proof of Address information.

What do you need to do?
If you are an existing user who has no up-to-date Identity Verification Advanced, please submit your current, valid Proof of Address at your earliest convenience.
You can update your Proof of Address here. ( http://url319.mail.bybit.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CaSbhUELMJv0fQMc2lSDT6KGdPabU83dpvSwrT0EseXsD9a2-2FZ9RIYbHR1Fs4p3T8xs4vVIX9pW2zXQ5uyNFAKJolTOL7q4ToYE0OE6GQUU-2BtOFxMlWTicN2wnez-2BDz44RKxQ8T-2FYfsxIy1gR2eDzDASS4bsOMlh-2B-2FNQ6oLC0ew-3DVhCm_mTOA-2BX07kQ2Ojbv-2BRbqdnpNrlwyNnm2KPByKJ9Ex4L2vKSlOXo5b9Zs41RNvLPkr1NnXoV-2FcPdW91qcbNZhKShJen3b1jWu9lT1-2Bl2O85gXIeXX2chQgWNpU6Byok6UDDGKWAGlDtATjmuL-2Fg5aoimhheB-2BL0yrmOen-2FL3dpzkD0efqq4I6zl4Fb08dNV4coNfKs9Y7pU-2BaF5wbSBzcT-2BTu-2FYYCaOD8WF15P-2BG4R9-2BDieN8td7W-2FIx1xnogxzEdU0ZuOAjnnGhVFFhmoceQnCxE0w5IizYnA7nfIDLGqH3MqZDm9QDUSg4srQeRJmj7TC4mVTRzgG2clOxvgG3n1k7Qs0e8PiViPkBLB6OdA97M3KvZi8sqrQ48DRJhVp8-2FX0EukBiDODS0OGmixLyWc3OZREgCnma1-2F6bX-2BdUmsfXvVKVQtoy5gAzpy1xXu8nXJYV7KbEt9uMQR53K78yz5pcFQtdurEf7vxBe40jxGWP2hLPvodO8CijRReHRsXV-2BL161OLqXThJsxVyB6oiZg-2F-2F96B6iZnQVw8ywlh2vN-2FDhn2SfQPdmp0XfasV7rKRNTROJybhH3jLiwqMOUuSC1BAo2CZ-2F-2B414vUzEZlA117WDv-2FwhFBGCAKAtOOx2MV8sirAZf2mBR-2F4wILMTPKN3iw38Wnef1WRhWnUhgggiKmfQryV-2FA6S1-2BALBGWheEbxLm28iBohAGtVLhJl-2BnoGsFGer501h4yT-2BkKQ-2FUvfA1OG6VRcG4SW0UHe3-2FKP2Mn9EUTypJUCOQLQo24kqy1DGrD9sijxv3ytQz-2FS-2FyJWmSTBM-3D )

75735.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 06/2026
75735.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať. Telefón: +421 222 11 55 65 E-mail: zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Otváracie hodiny Vami vybraného obchodného domu nájdete tu . Ďakujeme za Váš nákup a želáme Vám príjemný deň. Vaše SCONTO Potrebujete poradiť? Sme tu pre Vás celý týždeň vrátane víkendov 8-18h +421 222 11 55 65 zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Vše o nákupu Obchodní podmínky Starostlivosť o nábytok Odstúpenie od zmluvy Reklamácie Sledujte nás Prevádzkovateľom internetového obchodu sconto.sk je SCONTO Nábytok s.r.o., Nová ul. 8144/10, 917 01 Trnava, IČO 44731159, DIČ 2022821273, IČ DPH SK 2022821273, zapísaná v obchodnom registri Okresného súdu Trnava, oddiel Sro, vložka 25761/T.
